name: Winder Launcher
description: A compact ripcord-style launcher included with starter sets.
assessment: Winder Launcher is a right-spin launcher from the Beyblade X toyline. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: Winder Launcher L
description: A left-spin variant of the Winder Launcher.
assessment: Winder Launcher L is a left-spin launcher from the Beyblade X toyline. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: String Launcher
description: A string-pull launcher for strong, consistent launches.
assessment: String Launcher is a right-spin launcher from the Beyblade X toyline. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: String Launcher L
assessment: String Launcher L is a left-spin launcher from the Beyblade X toyline. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: Custom Launcher
description: A modular launcher used with the Custom Line system.
assessment: Custom Launcher is a right-spin launcher from the Beyblade X toyline. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.

name: Winder Launcher (Hasbro)
description: A compact ripcord-style launcher included with Hasbro starter sets.
assessment: The Hasbro Winder Launcher is the western release of the compact ripcord launcher. It launches right-spin Beys.

name: Winder Launcher L (Hasbro)
description: A left-spin variant of the Hasbro Winder Launcher.
assessment: The Hasbro Winder Launcher L is the western left-spin ripcord launcher, included in sets such as the 25th Anniversary Set.

name: String Launcher (Hasbro)
description: A string-pull launcher for strong, consistent launches.
assessment: The Hasbro String Launcher is the western release of the string-pull launcher. It launches right-spin Beys.

name: String Launcher L (Hasbro)
assessment: The Hasbro String Launcher L is the western left-spin string launcher, included in sets such as the 25th Anniversary Set.

name: Custom Launcher (Hasbro)
description: A modular launcher used with the Custom Line system.
assessment: The Hasbro Custom Launcher is the western release of the modular Custom Line launcher. It launches right-spin Beys.

name: Soar Phoenix Deluxe String Launcher Set
description: A deluxe string launcher set featuring Soar Phoenix colors.
assessment: The Soar Phoenix Deluxe String Launcher Set includes a right-spin string launcher with a Phoenix-themed design and grip accessories.

name: Cobalt Dragoon Deluxe Left-Spin String Launcher Set
description: A deluxe left-spin string launcher set featuring Cobalt Dragoon colors.
assessment: The Cobalt Dragoon Deluxe Left-Spin String Launcher Set includes a left-spin string launcher with a Dragoon-themed design and grip accessories.

name: Victory Grip Launcher Set
description: A launcher set featuring a custom grip for improved handling.
assessment: The Victory Grip Launcher Set is a Hasbro launcher accessory pack designed to improve launch stability with an ergonomic grip.

name: Clip & Rip Launcher Set
description: A launcher set featuring a clip-on ripcord mechanism.
assessment: The Clip & Rip Launcher Set is a Hasbro launcher accessory pack with a clip-on ripcord design for quick launching.

name: Bite Croc Deluxe String Launcher & Custom Grip Set
description: A deluxe string launcher and custom grip set featuring Bite Croc colors.
assessment: The Bite Croc Deluxe String Launcher & Custom Grip Set includes a right-spin string launcher with a Croc-themed design and a custom grip accessory.

name: Meteoroid Dragoon Deluxe Left-Spin String Launcher Set
description: A deluxe left-spin string launcher set featuring Meteoroid Dragoon colors.
assessment: The Meteoroid Dragoon Deluxe Left-Spin String Launcher Set includes a left-spin string launcher with a Dragoon-themed design and grip accessories.
